subcodes.first_line: O my two cherished friends! Your letters have been received, and the response was written and dispatched [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو یار عزیز من نامه های مرسول وصول یافت و جواب مرقوم شد و ارسال گردید در
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @consolation and comfort, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @permission for visit; pilgrimage
